title: Task Manifest Management in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest' directory in Hadoop MapReduce is pivotal for task manifest management. It contains classes like 'DirEntry', 'FileEntry', 'ManifestSuccessData', and 'TaskManifest' for generating and tracking task-generated files. 'LoadedManifestData' class in 'impl' subdirectory loads and manages manifest data, ensuring data integrity during MapReduce job output. This directory exemplifies a well-structured, maintainable, and efficient architectural pattern, utilizing object-oriented design, serialization, and adherence to Hadoop's data processing standards.
